series_metadata.series_description: Agreements between the community school sponsors and the governing authority of the community school.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Three years past the date on which the contract expires; is superseded by a new contract; or is made void by operation of law. ; Electronic: Three years past the date on which the contract expires; is superseded by a new contract; or is made void by operation of law., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
